---
name: Testing report
about: Privacy-safe test report for profile tuning
title: "[test] <operator> <profile>"
labels: test-report
assignees: ""
---

## Result

- Status: Works / Partly works / Does not work
- Tested date:
- Approx region (province or city only, optional):
- ISP/operator: MCI / Irancell / Rightel / Shatel / TCI / other
- Network: mobile data / home ISP / workplace / unknown
- IPv6 available: yes / no / unknown
- Client app:
- Xray-core version:
- Profile name:
- Failure type:
  - DNS fails
  - TLS handshake fails
  - Some apps work, browser fails
  - Browser works, apps fail
  - Very slow
  - Disconnects after N minutes
  - Battery/heat problem
- Notes:

## Recommended labels

`isp:mci`, `isp:irancell`, `dns`, `quic`, `ipv6`, `fragment`, `client:karing`, `client:v2rayng`

## Do not include

- Full IP address
- Phone number
- Telegram/Instagram handle
- Exact home/work location
- Screenshots containing personal data
- Full device identifiers
